{{CargoRelic
|name=Nethrone Sculpture
|class_id=20736
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Upon learning of Nethrone's demise, Earth's Will had a batch of statues crafted in the likeness of its head. One purpose was to commemorate the historic moment of triumph over a formidable foe, and the other was to gift these to the distinguished Travelers, allowing them to share in the Joy of victory!
|fame=12
|art=15
|fth=29
|civ=18
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail Leadership +1<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +50<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss2=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +100<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss3=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss4=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
|ss7=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +150<br>Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
